This application is submitted for approval to install a new 4-foot-high aluminum fence along the front perimeter of the property.<:The proposed fence is intended to enhance site security and establish controlled access to the building entrance and front patio area, which is currently open and accessible to the general public. Over the past two years, the property has experienced recurring incidents of vandalism, unauthorized loitering on the front steps and patio, and related disturbances. These conditions have adversely impacted the safe and orderly operation of the business, created safety and liability concerns for staff and visitors, and resulted in ongoing maintenance issues.<:<:The installation of the fence is a necessary security improvement designed to deter unauthorized access while maintaining an open and visually transparent streetscape consistent with the character of the surrounding area. The proposed aluminum fence is low-profile, non-opaque, and intended to preserve sightlines between the public right-of-way and the building frontage.<:The work will be limited to the front yard and will be constructed in compliance with all applicable City of St. Louis Building Code, Zoning Code provisions, and any relevant Right-of-Way or visibility triangle requirements, as applicable.  <:This improvement is intended solely to enhance safety, reduce unauthorized activity, and support continued lawful commercial use of the property.
